policy.semantic_applicability: model-assisted or professional, never inferred by the arithmetic engine
policy.legal_text_generation: record only studio-approved template references; do not reproduce or populate third-party drafts
policy.versioning: verify currency and applicability before each production use

sources.title: Decreto legislativo 21 novembre 2007, n. 231
sources.use_constraint: Verify the current consolidated text and case-specific applicability before use.

sources.title: Regole tecniche antiriciclaggio 2025
sources.issuer: Consiglio Nazionale dei Dottori Commercialisti e degli Esperti Contabili
sources.use_constraint: Use as a professional source; preserve the professional's assessment of applicability and facts.

sources.title: Indicazioni operative antiriciclaggio
sources.issuer: Consiglio Nazionale dei Dottori Commercialisti e degli Esperti Contabili
sources.use_constraint: Verify the current version and have a professional confirm exclusions, triggers, factor scores, and final treatment.

sources.title: Modulistica antiriciclaggio
sources.issuer: Consiglio Nazionale dei Dottori Commercialisti e degli Esperti Contabili
sources.use_constraint: Treat the original forms as the controlled source; generated summaries are not equivalent substitutes.

sources.title: Regulation (EU) 2016/679
sources.use_constraint: Determine controller and processor roles from the actual engagement; do not infer Article 28 applicability.

sources.title: Il ruolo del commercialista in materia di privacy e protezione dei dati — la valutazione della conformità al GDPR
sources.issuer: Consiglio Nazionale dei Dottori Commercialisti e degli Esperti Contabili
sources.use_constraint: Use for role analysis and review prompts, not as a ready-made client privacy notice.

sources.title: Legge 23 settembre 2025, n. 132, articolo 13
sources.use_constraint: Verify current text and applicability to the professional activity before drafting any AI transparency notice.
